rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a thorough copy-edit pass, improving readability and consistency without losing meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not comprehensively mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres strictly to the requested scope with no drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; clarity was improved.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes are noted, minor edits lack traceability.
